description: Colombian paramilitary group formed in 1992 to fight Pablo Escobar and the Medellín Cartel. Financed by the Cali Cartel and led by the Castaño brothers, they waged a small-scale war involving assassinations and bombings. The group disbanded after Escobar's death in 1993, with many members later joining the United Self-Defense Forces of Colombia (AUC).
